title: [Mace Combat Backport] Mace 3D in Hand
description: Adds a 3D Mace Model in Hand for Mace Combat Backport (mod by Mary_Undying).
body:
This resource pack converts the model of the mace in the hand into 3D for the [Mace Combat Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-combat-backport) mod. #### Credits for the 3D model of the mace: [UnduGT](https://modrinth.com/user/UnduGT) (approved) #### 3D model originally used in the Resource Pack: [Undopia 3D Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-3d-mace) ---

⚠️ Warning: Official Download Sources #### Beware! My content is **only** distributed for download from Modrinth and CurseForge.
#### Any other site doing so is **NOT** me!
